description: CrushFTP edge-appliance CVEs — authentication bypass (CVE-2025-31161) and VFS/SSTI auth bypass (CVE-2024-4040). Detection-only endpoint fingerprints.

crushftp_authbypass_2025.description: CVE-2025-31161 — CrushFTP authentication bypass via crafted Authorization header / race in the login handler, granting admin access. Detection = confirm the CrushFTP WebInterface and version banner; the auth-bypass flow is operator-supervised.

probes.description: CrushFTP WebInterface login present (200 with CrushFTP branding / crushftpver) confirms the CVE-2025-31161 attack surface. Fingerprint only.

crushftp_vfs_ssti_2024.description: CVE-2024-4040 — CrushFTP server-side template injection / VFS sandbox escape enabling unauthenticated file read + auth bypass. Detection = confirm the CrushFTP version endpoint; no SSTI payload is sent.

probes.description: CrushFTP function endpoint reachable (200/401 with CrushFTP markers) = the CVE-2024-4040 VFS/SSTI surface family is exposed. Endpoint fingerprint only — no template payload injected.
